scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['src-tauri/Cargo.toml','src-tauri/tauri.conf.json','src-tauri/src/main.rs']; for (const file of required) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) { console.error('Missing '+file); process.exit(1); } } const conf=fs.readFileSync('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json','utf8'); if (!conf.includes('com.kotacom.vitpos')) { console.error('Missing desktop identifier'); process.exit(1); } console.log('✓ Desktop scaffold valid')"
